creator: otis@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 218031
www/logswan: Update to 2.1.7

Hi,

please find the patch attached, it is a maintainer update of www/logswan to 2.1.7.

Changes since 2.1.6:
- Add a Perl program to generate an example MMDB database for testing
- Add a new test case to exercise the IP geolocation codepaths
- Add support for seccomp on arm
- Add missing test for __NR_mmap, the mmap syscall doesn't exist on arm

Testport results:
https://freebsd-stable.builder.wilbury.net/data/11_4_RELEASE_GENERIC-default/2020-09-17_20h32m54s/logs/logswan-2.1.7.log
https://freebsd-stable.builder.wilbury.net/data/12_STABLE_GENERIC_amd64-default/2020-09-17_20h27m35s/logs/logswan-2.1.7.log
https://freebsd-current.builder.wilbury.net/data/13cgx64-default/2020-09-17_20h27m46s/logs/logswan-2.1.7.log
